body_transformation: The rounded blob body gains a soft, velvety texture with a pastel lavender hue, its surface subtly shimmering with starlight silver dust. Delicate petal-like ear flaps replace the original pointed ears, each with crystalline veins glowing faintly. The curled tail tip transforms into a spiral of translucent, petal-thin layers that refract light like dewdrops. Small, rounded foot pads replace the stubby legs, each with a faint petal gold outline.
signature_feature: Tail spiral: translucent petal layers with refractive starlight silver veins.
